description: The Iozzo-Chiefari are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta, composed of two families from Chiaravalle Centrale and Torre di Ruggiero, also active in Cardinale. They are part of the Locale of Serra San Bruno. Involved in drug trafficking, illegal weapons, construction, earthmoving, timber, and subcontracting. Several members have been arrested in operations such as Ortrhus (2019) and Anteo (2021).
